title: Matera Pix Report Featured in Fintech Times
excerpt: The Latin American payments sector has been dominated by the success of Pix. In fact, according to a report by Matera, an instant payments, QR code, and digital ledger technology firm,
body: The Latin American payments sector has been dominated by the success of Pix. In fact, according to a report by Matera, an instant payments, QR code, and digital ledger technology firm, Pix transactions exceeded six billion monthly in Q4'24. It is, therefore, no surprise that other countries in the region are looking to emulate this success, the latest being Colombia as it announces Bre-B.
